metadata.description: Tool-Based Agent Architecture — 12 specialized agents with 145+ MCP tools, dynamic team assembly, and shared memory coordination

plugins.name: dev-stack
plugins.description: Tool-Based Agent Architecture v10 — 12 specialized agents (orchestrator, memory-keeper, code-analyzer, code-writer, researcher, doc-writer, qa-validator, security-scanner, git-operator, task-planner, file-manager, data-engineer) with 145+ MCP tools. Features: Dynamic team assembly, shared memory protocol, tool priority (MCP > Plugins > Skills > Built-in), Git safety policy
